title: OSMM Experience Component Object
description: A reusable building block of experiences — a headline, hero, CTA, copy block, offer card, trust block, content block, wireframe, image treatment, or subject line — defined once and referenced by id into many Experience objects. It is a definition (the copy / the spec of the block), not a rendered asset. Canonical schema for object_type 'experience_component'. The osmm-experience-component-builder skill references this file; it is the single source of truth for the object's shape.

osmm_version.description: OSMM schema version this instance conforms to (semantic version).

experience_component_id.description: Stable, human-readable id. Prefix 'EXC-' + lowercase hyphen slug. Never changes once assigned; Experience objects reference it.

version.description: Instance version (e.g. '1.0'). Bump on revision; the id stays stable.

name.description: Human-readable name of the component, used to recognize and reference it.

component_type.description: Governed component-type vocabulary. Pick the single closest value.

content.description: The actual definition of the block. For copy components (headline/cta/copy_block/subject_line) this is the text; for a wireframe or image_treatment it is a description of the block.
The alternate copy / definition for this variant.

variants.description: Signal-bearing alternate versions of the component (e.g. headline options for testing), each { variant, content }. Optional.

usage_notes.description: Where and how to use the component — context, placement, fit. Optional.

guidelines.description: Do's and constraints that govern correct use of the component. Optional.

linked_brand_context.description: Id of the Brand Context whose voice and guardrails this component follows. 'BRC-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' ok. Optional.

linked_product.description: Id of the Product Context this component relates to. 'PRD-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' ok. Optional.

linked_personas.description: 'PER-' ids of personas this component is written for. 'PER-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' ok. Optional.

source.description: One line: what source(s) this was built from and approximate date. Optional.
